subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He in Whose grasp lie the dominion of the eternal realm and the empire of glory and splendour, and within Whose grasp are all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی بیده ملکوت ملک البقا ثم جبروت العز و السنا و فی قبضه ارادته من فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
